item.name: Atlassian Get Addon Linkers Key Values

request.name: Atlassian Get Addon Linkers Key Values

description.content:
Gets a list of all [linker](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/) values for the
specified linker of the authenticated application.

A linker value lets applications supply values to modify its regular expression.

The base regular expression must use a Bitbucket-specific match group `(?K)`
which will be translated to `([\w\-]+)`. A value must match this pattern.

[Read more about linker values](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/#usingthebitbucketapitosupplyvalues)

variable.description:
(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

as defined in an application descriptor.

(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

request.name: Atlassian Post Addon Linkers Key Values

description.content:
Creates a [linker](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/) value for the specified
linker of authenticated application.

A linker value lets applications supply values to modify its regular expression.

The base regular expression must use a Bitbucket-specific match group `(?K)`
which will be translated to `([\w\-]+)`. A value must match this pattern.

[Read more about linker values](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/#usingthebitbucketapitosupplyvalues)

variable.description:
(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

response.name: The linker already has the value being added.

variable.description:
(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

item.name: Put
Atlassian Put Addon Linkers Key Values

request.name: Atlassian Put Addon Linkers Key Values

description.content:
Bulk update [linker](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/) values for the specified
linker of the authenticated application.

A linker value lets applications supply values to modify its regular expression.

The base regular expression must use a Bitbucket-specific match group `(?K)`
which will be translated to `([\w\-]+)`. A value must match this pattern.

[Read more about linker values](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/#usingthebitbucketapitosupplyvalues)

variable.description:
(Required) The unique key of a [linker module](/cloud/bitbucket/modules/linker/)
as defined in an application descriptor.

of the authenticated application.

description.content:
The Atlassian BitBucket Addon API is a tool that allows developers to create custom add-ons and integrations for the BitBucket platform. With this API, developers can extend the functionality of BitBucket by building new features, tools, and services that enhance the user experience. By leveraging the Addon API, developers can create seamless integrations with other tools and services, automate repetitive tasks, and streamline workflows within the BitBucket platform.

Contact Support:
 Name: Bitbucket Support
 Email: support@bitbucket.org
